description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for time-based filtering and trend analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account/property the data belongs to.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Country of the user session (e.g. India / United States). Useful for geo-based segmentation.
City of the user session (e.g. Mumbai / New York). Granular geo breakdown.
Traffic source that first acquired the user (e.g. google / facebook / (direct)). Attribution source.
Campaign name under which the user was first acquired. Links sessions to marketing campaigns.
Campaign ID under which the user was first acquired. Numeric identifier for the campaign.
Marketing medium that first acquired the user (e.g. cpc / organic / none). Attribution medium.
Number of completed ecommerce transactions in that session group.
Fraction of sessions that were not engaged (0.0 to 1.0). Lower is better.
Number of sessions that lasted more than 10 seconds or had a conversion or 2+ page views.
Average session duration in seconds for this segment.
Total number of users (new + returning) in the segment.
Number of users who had an engaged session during the period.
Number of first-time users in the segment.
Total number of sessions in the segment.
Total number of page views or screen views recorded.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
